steps.title: Match the pronoun to its noun
steps.content: The pronoun refers back to chicken fat, which the previous sentence calls the substance. That noun is singular and nonhuman, so the blank needs a singular nonhuman pronoun that clearly refers back to it.

steps.title: Reject number and reference errors
steps.content: Choice A and choice B are plural, so they do not match the singular substance. Choice C is singular but does not work as a natural personal back-reference in this sentence. The remaining pronoun clearly refers to the singular substance that begins to combust. The answer is D.
